record.field: Standard invoice from Rwandan suppliers. Amounts in RWF, VAT 18%.
vendor_name reference_number document_date total_amount tax_amount currency vat_number contact_address contact_phone contact_email line_items

This is a Rwandan supplier invoice. Amounts are in RWF. VAT rate is typically 18%. Extract all line items with description, quantity, unit price and total. The vendor's TIN/VAT number may appear as "TIN:" or "VAT Reg No:".
Proforma / quotation invoice — extract full line items for bill creation.
vendor_name reference_number document_date total_amount tax_amount currency contact_name contact_address contact_phone line_items
This is a proforma invoice or quotation. Extract each line item separately with description, quantity, unit price, and subtotal. The document type is proforma.
Shop receipt or expense receipt. For employee expense claims.
vendor_name document_date total_amount tax_amount currency reference_number contact_address
This is a purchase receipt. Extract the store name as vendor_name, the receipt date, total paid, and any tax shown. The reference_number is the receipt or transaction number.
Candidate CV for HR applicant creation.

This is a CV or resume. Extract the candidate's full name as contact_name, their email, phone number, and current address. The vendor_name field should contain their current or most recent employer. The suggested_action must be create_applicant.
Service or supply contract — extract parties, dates, and amounts.
vendor_name contact_name reference_number document_date total_amount currency contact_address
This is a service or supply contract. Extract the supplier/vendor name, contract reference number, start date as document_date, and total contract value as total_amount.
